budi:modelName.commondevice:name: Width reducing clamp D42 36-21 for new model blade cover
Width reducing clamp D42-30-20 for new model blade cover
Width reducing clamp D80 65-22 for new model blade cover
Width reducing clamp D80 50-21 for new model blade cover
Width reducing clamp D80 35-20 for new model blade cover

lngs:name.lngs:textValue: Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degrees Celsius
H229 - Pressurized container: may burst if heated
Operating: between 700-1060 hPa, Storage: between 500-1060 hPa, Transport: between 500-1060 hPa
Explosion Hazard: Do not use in the presence of oxygen, nitrous oxide, or other flammable anesthetics.

Use of accessories, transducers and cables other than those specified or provided by the manufacturer of this equipment could result in increased electromagnetic emissions or decreased electromagnetic immunity of this equipment and result in improper operation.
EM disturbances might affect blade movement within the dermatome
